title: Accessibility
declarationContent: Insee is committed to making its websites, intranet, extranet, and software accessible in accordance with the law. This accessibility statement applies to the site.
conformityStatusDescription: The Insee online survey response site is not compliant with the RGAA due to the absence of a compliance audit.
testResultsContent: This statement will be updated as soon as the results of the compliance audit are known.
nonSubmittedContentTitle: Content Not Subject to Accessibility Obligation
establishmentContent: This statement was established on July 9, 2024, by the Insee Digital Accessibility Network.
technologiesUsedTitle: Technologies Used for the Site Development
evaluatedPagesTitle: Pages of the Site That Have Been Verified for Conformity
feedbackContactContent: If you are unable to access content or a service, you can contact support to be directed to an accessible alternative or to obtain the content in another form.
recourseContent: If you notice an accessibility defect and do not receive a response, you may contact the Defender of Rights.
